bio: Operations-focused teammate with a strong track record in shift quality, safety, and cross-team delivery.

metrics.label: PPI
metrics.description: Predictive Performance Indicator projects consistency and expected delivery quality.

metrics.label: OTS
metrics.description: On-time Streak tracks how many shifts you started on schedule in the rolling year.

metrics.label: Daily
metrics.description: Daily score summarizes your current shift performance using attendance and outcomes.

metrics.label: Team
metrics.description: Team score reflects overall performance quality across your assigned work group.

metrics.label: Success
metrics.description: Success estimates your likelihood of completing key goals based on trend signals.

metrics.label: Productivity
metrics.description: Productivity measures output efficiency relative to expected effort and pace.

dashboard.clockAlert: You are scheduled with Team Blue this week. Confirm your clock-ins at shift start.
